Bx12 SBS corridor, providing a key crosstown transit connection in the Bronx.

Bus corridor serving Bx9, Bx12 SBS/Local, Bx17, Bx22, B-L 60, B-L 61, B-L 62. 113,700 weekday riders (NYCT routes only), 53,100 use the Bx12 SBS and Local. Bus speeds 6.8 mph during AM Peak, 5.9 during PM Peak. Key issues: significant and consistent decline in bus speeds in recent years, high curb demand, frequently blocked bus lanes, traffic and sidewalk congestion.

description: Study of bus priority treatments along the Bx12 corridor, including Fordham Road and 207th Street/University Heights Bridge connection to Inwood, with three design alternatives (A, B, C) under traffic analysis

Study of three alternatives for bus priority treatments along Fordham Road: Alternative A (Offset Bus Lanes), Alternative B (Eastbound Busway), Alternative C (Two-Way Busway). Presented to Bronx Community Board 6 in June 2023.
Proposed bus priority treatments along Fordham Road including offset bus lanes, eastbound busway, and two-way busway alternatives. Presented to Bronx Community Board 7 in June 2023.
Proposed bus priority improvements along Fordham Road including offset bus lanes and busway alternatives, presented to Bronx Community Board 11 in June 2023
Project studying bus priority improvements on Fordham Road, including offset bus lanes and busway alternatives, presented to Fordham Road Community Advisory Board

Bus priority project on Fordham Road from Major Deegan Expressway to Boston Road, presented to Community Advisory Board in January 2021. DOT does not have a proposed design; alternatives will be developed based on feedback and data analysis.
Community engagement and design development for bus priority treatments along Fordham Road from Major Deegan Expressway to Boston Road

Bus priority project on Fordham Road evaluating three alternatives: Alternative A (offset bus lanes), Alternative B (eastbound busway), and Alternative C (two-way busway). Advanced Alternative A as the preferred treatment.

records.display_name: Alternative B: Eastbound Busway from Morris Av to Webster Av

payload.description: Eastbound through traffic restrictions on Fordham Rd, except for buses and trucks, with local access on all blocks. Offset lane in westbound direction and offset bus lanes as proposed in Alternative A outside the Busway section. In effect at all times (24/7).
payload.location_text: Fordham Road from Morris Av to Webster Av

normalized_location.raw_text: Fordham Road from Morris Av to Webster Av

records.display_name: Alternative C: Two-Way Busway between Jerome & Webster Aves

payload.description: Both eastbound and westbound through traffic restrictions on Fordham Rd, except for buses and trucks, with local access on all blocks; also includes offset bus lanes proposed in Alternative A outside the Busway section. In effect at all times (24/7).
payload.location_text: Fordham Road between Jerome Av and Webster Av

normalized_location.raw_text: Fordham Road between Jerome Av and Webster Av

records.display_name: Alternative A: Offset Bus Lanes in Both Directions

payload.description: Convert existing curbside bus lanes to offset lanes and extend offset lanes. In effect at all times (24/7). Bus-only lane located one-lane away from the curb. Single travel lane in both directions. Vehicles allowed to use offset bus lanes for right turns.
